title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Salarpuria Sattva Global Group:
Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva Global Group!
